title: ぐんぐん！あたしと強くなるの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Temporary trainer or not, I'm determined to make full use of this
opportunity to show off my training skills. That being said...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is about Ines Fujin. I need to be careful not to push her too hard
or make her feel boxed in. With that in mind, I carefully craft a
training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, this is a ton of training!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This set's all about speed, and this one's focused on stamina...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Isn't this a bit overkill?! Haha, I think you're getting a little too
excited!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heh... That was a good laugh. Anyway, I understand your enthusiasm,
but can we really get through all of this before the big day?
choice_data_list: You don't need to do everything.
You don't need to do everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By experimenting with different training methods, I can better
understand where she truly needs to improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I lay it all on the table and tell her she's free to make her own
decisions.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You want me to choose?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well... okay then! Let's see... Maaaybe I'll pick one that'll have you working the hardest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus, our training begins!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew, my whole body's burning! But I'm not done yet! Gotta keep
pushing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... H-hold on... Timeout!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pheeew... I can't stand anymore... Hehe, it feels sooo goooood...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Day after day, she chooses a different workout plan, and day after
day, I help her through it. Then, finally...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Really?! You figured out what my best running style is?! Tell me, tell
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear from watching her train—she's the kind of runner who gives it
her all, even in practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pushes herself to the point of collapsing; that's not something
just anyone can do. So we should use that to her advantage.
choice_data_list: We'll turn the race into a battle of endurance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Start strong, lead early, take a breather before the final sprint, then
burn everything to the finish line... The perfect strategy for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as she stays calm and keeps her pace steady, her explosive
speed will be her trump card to victory.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Got it... Leave enough gas in the tank, then let it rip...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: If I can just hold the front and never back down... No, I know I can. That's why—I will win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's our final day of training before the big event...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No way! Rain?! All day?! How are we supposed to train?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy has tons of indoor training facilities. As long as
they're not fully booked, we'll be golden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell myself it'll all be fine as we head over to the gym and pool,
but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Bummer... Everywhere's completely full.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't believe we're cooped up in my office today of all days...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer. Wanna hear a special spell that'll cheer you right up?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Breathe one and two—take in the view.
Once that's done, just do what you can, one by one!"

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You like it? It's something my mom always said to me since I was a
kid. Now it's my go-to charm whenever I'm feeling down!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You should give it a try. Just repeat those words, and I guarantee
your shoulders will feel lighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might sound like she's teasing me, but her eyes are sincere—she's
genuinely trying to cheer me up.
choice_data_list: Thanks. Your mom must be a wonderful person.
Thanks. Your mom must be a wonderful person.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! In fact, my whole family's amazing! They're super kind and super
smart!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: In fact, without them, I wouldn't be at this school!
choice_data_list: Were they the ones who pushed you to apply?
Were they the ones who pushed you to apply?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But it probably wasn't an easy decision for them.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My mom gets sick pretty often. When my sisters were smaller, I
needed to help around the house more, so I ended up attending a
regular middle school.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I still loved running, of course. Heck, I'd been on the track team since
elementary school. But I planned to quit once I graduated middle
school.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's why... even though I knew I could start at Tracen from high
school, I never seriously considered it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Tomorrow's the final track meet, huh... Since I'll be going to a
vocational high school, I guess this will be my last race...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No! Think happy thoughts! I'm sure I'll get over it after a while!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's when my mom handed me a bundle of papers. To my surprise,
it was an application to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Things at home are fine now, and your sisters can take care of
themselves. Go chase your dreams and do what you love.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Mom...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
She encouraged me to face my true feelings. I didn't want to quit—I
wanted to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That was when I finally let myself hope... Maybe I could go to the academy! It took me a little longer to actually take the plunge, though!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Mom gave me the push I needed. And when I got accepted, Dad
scraped together the tuition fees.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My sisters are helping out at home now, too. So I owe it all to them
that I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My family will be there, and I really want to show them the fruits of
my hard work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the way she speaks about her family, it's clear she treasures
them dearly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determination fills me—we must succeed at the Tracen Meet, no
matter what.
choice_data_list:
We'll definitely make your family proud
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Yep, yep! That's the spirit! Just what I expected from my
trainer! ♪ Well, temporary trainer!
